clause_ref: ISO 19650-5:2020 — Security-minded approach to information management
_title: ISO 19650-5 — Security-minded approach to information management
_note: Part 5 establishes the security-minded approach. Sensitivity assessments determine whether security controls are required. NOT a full cybersecurity standard — refers to ISO/IEC 27000 series for technical controls.

security_minded_approach.principle: Apply proportionate security based on sensitivity assessment of the information
triggers: Public-facing buildings with high-occupancy or high-value contents

assessment_process.step_4: Implement security controls (cryptographic, access, governance, technical)

security_classifications._note: Classification scheme is project-specific or jurisdiction-specific (e.g., UK Government Security Classifications: OFFICIAL/SECRET/TOP SECRET)
